title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
